_comment: Track D — branded image backgrounds. Each entry: file (PNG in this dir, 1080x1080), label (button text, en/ru), textZone (where the empty area for text is: bottom|center|band). Files prefixed with '_' (e.g. _test) are dev-only and hidden from the bot menu. Kirill drops real Canva PNGs here (no logo — the bot overlays logo.png).
